scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c orange,cyan "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @twinops/shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @twinops/shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
